randomGreetings: Hope you have a great day! ☀️
intro.about_me: As a frontend engineer, I specialize in building responsive and high-performance UIs across web, mobile, and desktop platforms. I have experience developing Web3 DApps and enterprise service platforms, with a strong focus on writing maintainable code and delivering smooth user experiences. I value teamwork and leverage my background in design to implement user-centric UI/UX with careful attention to detail.

personal.title: Personal Projects & Study
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: Currently focusing on personal development and preparing for international opportunities. Building innovative projects while improving language skills for the Australian/New Zealand job market.

confidential_japanese_startup.title: Frontend development support for new B2C business initiatives (Fully Remote)
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: Collaborated remotely as a frontend developer for a Japanese B2C service platform. Joined the project shortly before release and contributed under tight deadlines to meet the launch schedule. Built and maintained dynamic application pages tailored to six distinct business types. Developed reusable UI components using shadcn/ui and styled them with Tailwind CSS for consistent, responsive design. Designed multi-step forms with React Hook Form and Zod for input validation and error handling. Integrated RESTful APIs using fetch and managed client-side state with React Context API. Monitored system health and resolved issues post-launch through continuous tracking with Datadog.
challenges: Joined the project shortly before release and needed to complete stable frontend development and deployment under a tight schedule
Faced complexity in efficiently implementing and maintaining customized pages tailored for six different business types
Required to utilize various technologies such as React Hook Form, Zod, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS to deliver a consistent user experience and responsive UI simultaneously
achievements: Successfully built and supported the launch of dynamic pages for six business types within a strict deadline
Designed and implemented reusable UI components, greatly improving development efficiency and code maintainability
Ensured post-launch system stability through continuous monitoring with Datadog and prompt issue resolution

turingum_web03_tokyo_beast_base.title: Support services for Web3 product campaign site and system development (Fully Remote)
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: I initially participated in the development of the “NFT Staking” page in the BASE section, and later joined the frontend development team. I led style adjustments for the homepage marquee area, design renewal and multilingual support for the “GACHA” and “MARKET” pages, and performed fine style tuning across the entire homepage. I integrated multilingual SMS verification and enhanced mobile responsiveness. For existing frontend bug fixes, I collaborated closely with the previous developer. I utilized wagmi and RainbowKit for wallet integration, GSAP for animations, and SWR for data management. Regarding the “Mystery Ticket” page, I handled style and functional modifications due to planning changes, as well as additional development involving direct Web3 and API integration.
challenges: Overcame technical challenges while implementing complex features during Web3 wallet integration and direct API integration
Performed UI/UX optimization considering both multilingual support and mobile responsiveness
Identified and quickly fixed numerous bugs in code written by existing frontend developers within the team, improving service stability
achievements: Independently developed the “NFT Staking” page, collaborating with backend developers to review and resolve API latency issues, successfully delivering an interactive user experience
Promptly handled design updates and multilingual support for renewed pages, enhancing service quality and accessibility
Collaborated with responsible developers to swiftly fix critical bugs, significantly improving overall project stability

turingum_web03_tokyo_beast_mystery_ticke.title: Development support for a Web3 product campaign site (Fully Remote)
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: I was responsible for frontend development, multilingual support, and code refactoring for a dynamic, animation-heavy Web3 campaign site. Through thorough research, I successfully integrated GSAP with Next.js to enable smooth and efficient animations. Subsequently, I took over the initial "Mystery Ticket" feature and supported frontend development for the BASE section, including handling confidential new tasks.
challenges: Implementing animation-heavy designs optimized for performance within a Next.js environment
Integrating GSAP into Next.js with minimal impact on rendering and project structure
Managing inherited code from previous developers while working on new features simultaneously
achievements: Successfully integrated GSAP into Next.js, enabling smooth and efficient animations
Took over and enhanced the "Mystery Ticket" feature, improving and extending its functionality
Supported frontend development of the BASE section and handled confidential new tasks smoothly

turingum_web03_wizardry_campaign.title: Developed a campaign site for a Web3.0 project (Fully Remote)
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: Through a connection with Turingum K.K., a Japanese Web3 consulting company, I contributed to the development of a Web3 campaign site for a major Japanese gaming company. As this was my first Web3 project, I received valuable advice from key contacts at Turingum, which enabled smooth project execution and a successful release. I led frontend architecture design and implementation using Next.js, focusing on multilingual support, code refactoring, responsive design, and direct integration with blockchain smart contracts. I also collaborated with a designer to enhance the UI by creating assets and improving usability. One of the key contacts requested that I develop a Merkle tree CLI tool. Although it was my first time creating such a tool, I completed it without issues. Later, the key contacts highly praised the tool and asked for permission to use it internally. Additionally, I received a request to use the frontend architecture I built as training material for junior developers.
challenges: It was my first Web3 project, so I had to quickly gain practical knowledge about blockchain and smart contract integration
I needed to implement a complex multilingual and responsive architecture within a short timeframe
Developing a Merkle tree CLI tool was a completely new and technically challenging task for me
achievements: With guidance from Turingum K.K., I quickly caught up with Web3 concepts and contributed to smooth project delivery
Successfully led the design and implementation of a multilingual, responsive frontend using Next.js
Completed a fully functional Merkle tree CLI tool on first attempt, which was well-received and approved for internal use

confidential_korean_startup.title: Frontend Maintenance & Development for a Tennis Court Reservation Mobile App(Fully Remote)
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: I participated as a freelance frontend developer in the maintenance and new feature development project for a React Native mobile app operated by a Korean startup running a sports reservation platform. Since the app had already been released, I initially took responsibility for quickly fixing bugs. By promptly resolving issues and updating the app on each platform’s store, we were able to alleviate user inconveniences. Later, I was assigned to refactor existing code and improve UI/UX. I was also invited to participate in new development. Throughout the project, I prioritized user experience and service reliability, collaborating closely with the client to ensure smooth progress.
challenges: Fixing bugs in legacy code without detailed documentation
Ensuring compatibility and stability across both iOS and Android platforms
Improving UI/UX while minimizing disruption to existing features
achievements: Resolved critical bugs and released timely updates to app stores
Refactored major parts of the codebase for better readability and maintainability
Enhanced user experience through UI/UX improvements and performance tuning

dmonster_dongnaebook.title: [Delivery App] Frontend Development for POS System (Desktop) and Store Owner Mobile App
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: As a freelance frontend developer, I was responsible for developing the POS system and the store-owner mobile application for a Korean delivery service platform. The mobile app was developed using React Native for both iOS and Android, while the POS system was implemented as a desktop application using Electron and React. I developed key features such as login (SNS, general, auto), store management (holiday settings for all or specific stores), and real-time order status display. Later, my responsibilities expanded to include SerialPort communication and receipt printing features in the desktop application. One of the most technically challenging tasks was implementing receipt printing in the Electron environment without relying on printer drivers. By referencing C# WinPlatform and Python Qt implementations and exploring various libraries, I was able to successfully implement the feature using SerialPort communication.
challenges: Managing the development of both mobile and desktop applications simultaneously
Implementing complex business logic such as store-specific settings and real-time order tracking
Overcoming the technical challenge of printing receipts in Electron without printer drivers
Finding a stable solution for SerialPort communication with limited official documentation
achievements: Developed a mobile app for store owners using React Native, supporting both iOS and Android
Built a POS desktop application with Electron and React, ensuring stable performance across features
Successfully implemented SerialPort-based receipt printing by referencing C# and Python examples
Implemented various login methods (SNS, general, auto) and real-time order display functionality

dmonster_moli.title: Frontend Development for Desktop Application for Simultaneous Interpretation Listeners
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: I took over a mobile app project for simultaneous interpretation listeners from another engineer and was responsible for developing additional features and submitting the app to both the iOS and Android stores. Later, at the client's request, I led the development of a desktop version of the same application using Electron. The app featured real-time voice call functionality for both interpreter and listener modes using Agora SDK, window resizing tailored for macOS and Windows, downloadable material support, and sound visualization for live voice volume levels. During development, I faced integration issues with the Electron version of Agora SDK. As no stable solution was available at the time, I implemented a creative workaround by customizing the Web SDK to work within Electron, which allowed the app to function as intended. This experience highlighted the importance of flexible thinking and creative problem-solving.
challenges: Taking over an existing mobile app project mid-development and understanding legacy code
Resolving compatibility issues when integrating Agora SDK into the Electron environment
Adapting Web SDK for desktop use due to lack of official support for Electron
achievements: Successfully implemented interpreter/listener voice call features using Agora SDK
Built a cross-platform desktop app (macOS/Windows) with real-time sound visualization and material download features
Overcame SDK limitations through creative problem-solving and custom integration

dmonster_mozaiq.title: Support for the development of a mobile application for vacation cottage (rental villa) booking
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: 日本のブロックチェーンスタートアップと連携し、大手ゲーム会社向けのWeb3キャンペーンサイトのフロントエンド開発にフリーランスとして携わりました。Next.jsを用いたアーキテクチャ設計、多言語対応、リファクタリング、レスポンシブデザインなどを担当しました。 デザイナーの方と協力しながら、UIの改善に向けたアセット作成や課題の洗い出しにも貢献しました。開発したMerkle Tree CLIは社内でツールとして活用され、構築したフロントエンド構成は社内のオンボーディングや研修資料としても参考にされています。
